description_long: This is a plush toy modeled after a small, fox-like creature with large, upright ears and a bushy tail. Its fur is a soft, pale peach color with a white-tipped tail and a fluffy white ruff around its neck, decorated with pastel-colored flower patterns. The toy has large, expressive purple eyes and a small, rounded nose, giving it a cute and endearing appearance. Its limbs are short and rounded, with tiny paws that have subtle pink details. The overall surface appears velvety and soft, typical of high-quality stuffed animals. The toy is designed to sit upright, making it suitable for display or cuddling.
description: A soft, peach-colored stuffed animal with large ears, a bushy white-tipped tail, and a floral-patterned neck ruff. It has big purple eyes and a cute, plush appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large purple eyes, upright ears, and the floral-patterned white ruff around the neck.
description_view_1: Side-back view highlighting the bushy, white-tipped tail and the back of the floral ruff.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the full, rounded tail and the back of the head and ruff.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the profile of the face, the large ears, and the plush body with the tail extending behind.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is wide-eyed and curious, with large, round purple eyes and a small, neutral mouth. The overall look is gentle and endearing.
attribute_clothing_or_accessories: white ruff with pastel flower patterns
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with its front paws slightly raised and hind legs bent, head facing forward and ears perked up.
